campaign.title: Your Membership Proposal
campaign.subject: [First Name] — your Community Influencer proposal is ready
campaign.description: Full proposal with pricing, package details, and checkout

landing_page.ai_goal: Present the full proposal and get commitment
landing_page.data_capture_fields: name, email, business_name, category, community, payment

slides.title: Your Proposal
slides.narration: This is your Community Influencer proposal for your community. Everything that's included, what it costs, and what happens when you say yes.

slides.title: Your Presence

content.headline: Where You'll Show Up
points: Premium listing in Day.News — community newspaper
Premium listing in Downtown Guide — business directory
Premium listing in GoEventCity — event calendar

slides.narration: Here's where your business will show up. Premium listings across all three publications — Day.News, Downtown Guide, and GoEventCity. A professional web presence at your own AlphaSite URL. And regular features in the community newsletter reaching thousands of local subscribers.

slides.title: Your Marketing

content.headline: What You Get Every Month
points: 2 ads in rotation across all publications

slides.narration: Every month, your business gets fifteen to twenty mentions in community news coverage. Two featured events with full promotion. Three coupons distributed to subscribers with tracking. Two ads in rotation. And a monthly performance report showing your results.

slides.title: Your Competitive Advantage

content.headline: What You Lock In
points: Priority placement over every non-member business
Your [Category] slot — competitors cannot take it

slides.narration: This is the competitive advantage. You get priority placement over every business that isn't a member. A verified badge on all your listings. And your category slot is locked — once you have it, your competitors can't take it. That's the part that matters most.

slides.title: The Value
slides.narration: Let me do the math. Premium listings across three directories would cost about three hundred a month individually. A professional website, thirty a month. Advertising, two hundred plus. Content creation and distribution, five hundred plus. Total: over a thousand a month. Your Influencer membership: three hundred. You do the math.

slides.title: What Happens Next

content.headline: When You Say Yes
points: Day 1: Premium listings go live across all directories
Day 2-3: Your AlphaSite is built and published
Week 1: First business mention in Day.News

slides.narration: Here's the timeline. Day one, your premium listings go live. Within a few days, your AlphaSite is built. First week, your first mention in Day.News. Second week, newsletter feature. End of month one, your first performance report. Everything moves fast once you're in.

slides.title: Lock In Your Position

content.headline: $300/month — Lock In Your Position
content.body: 12-month commitment. 3 bonus months free. Founder rate locked for 3 years.

slides.narration: Your proposal is ready. Three hundred dollars a month, twelve-month commitment, three bonus months free. If you want to move forward, click below and we'll have everything live within forty-eight hours. If you want to talk first, schedule a call. I want to be transparent — your category has limited slots and I've been hearing from other businesses. I can't hold your position.

slides.title: From Your Account Manager

content.headline: [AM Name]
content.body: I think you should lock this in. Here's why: [Category] slots are filling and Founder pricing won't last. But it's your decision and I respect whatever you choose.

slides.narration: One more thing. I think you should lock this in. Your category is filling and Founder pricing has a deadline. But this is your money and your decision. I'm here to answer questions and help you through the process. That's my job.

email_proposal.subject: [First Name] — your Community Influencer proposal is ready
email_proposal.preview_text: Everything included and what it costs
email_proposal.body:
Hi [First Name],

I've put together your Community Influencer proposal for [Community Name]. Here's what's in it:

YOUR PRESENCE:
→ Premium listing in Day.News, Downtown Guide, and GoEventCity
→ Professional web presence at [business].alphasite.com
→ Featured in community newsletter ([X] subscribers)

YOUR MARKETING:
→ [15-20] news mentions per month across [Community Name] coverage
→ 2 featured events per month
→ 3 coupons per month with distribution and tracking
→ 2 ads per month in rotation
→ Monthly performance reports

YOUR COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGE:
→ Priority placement over every non-member business
→ Verified Community Influencer badge
→ Your [Category] slot locked — competitors can't take it

PRICING:
→ $300/month — 12-month commitment
→ First-year bonus: 3 FREE months (months 13-15)
→ Effective rate: $240/month over 15 months
→ Founder rate: $300/month locked for 3 years (if signed by [date])

[REVIEW YOUR FULL PROPOSAL →]

Your [Category] has [X] of [Y] slots remaining in [Community Name]. I've been in contact with other [Category] businesses in the area. Slots are first-come, first-served — I can't hold them.

If you want to move forward, the proposal page has a checkout link. If you want to talk it through first:

[SCHEDULE A CALL WITH ME →]

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
[phone] | [email]
